steps.title: Identify what the passage announces upfront
steps.content: The opening sentence introduces a specific discovery: a runestone found in Norway. This is the passage's primary subject, not the dating method, battles, or any expert's research agenda.

steps.title: Match this announcement to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer directly states the opening subject: a runestone found in Norway.

The other options either address topics the passage doesn't cover (A brings in battles; C focuses on dating methodology) or mistake a supporting detail for the main point (D spotlights an expert mentioned only at the end).

That confirms B is correct.
